payload.answer: The new statement appears to correct the existing current fact: it says Sam from Goldman likes early Coltrane instead of Bill Evans. Safe actions available are: approve_supersession to replace the current Bill Evans preference with the early Coltrane correction; keep_both if both should remain because the situation is ambiguous or context-dependent; reject_new if the correction is wrong; or edit if the correction needs adjusted wording before saving.
